Uses of Class
redis.clients.jedis.args.FlushMode

  • Packages that use FlushMode 
    Package Description
    redis.clients.jedis  
    redis.clients.jedis.args
    This package contains the classes that represent arguments of Redis core commands.
    redis.clients.jedis.commands
    This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.

    • Uses of FlushMode in redis.clients.jedis

      Methods in redis.clients.jedis with parameters of type FlushMode 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String Jedis.flushAll(FlushMode flushMode)
      Delete all the keys of all the existing databases, not just the currently selected one.
      String Jedis.flushDB(FlushMode flushMode)
      Delete all the keys of the currently selected DB.
      Response<String> TransactionBase.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      String Jedis.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      CommandObject<String> CommandObjects.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      String UnifiedJedis.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      Response<String> MultiNodePipelineBase.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      Response<String> Pipeline.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      Response<String> TransactionBase.scriptFlush(byte[] sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode) 
      CommandObject<String> CommandObjects.scriptFlush(byte[] sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode) 
      String UnifiedJedis.scriptFlush(byte[] sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode) 
      Response<String> MultiNodePipelineBase.scriptFlush(byte[] sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode) 
      Response<String> Pipeline.scriptFlush(byte[] sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode)

    • Uses of FlushMode in redis.clients.jedis.args

      Methods in redis.clients.jedis.args that return FlushMode 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static FlushMode FlushMode.valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static FlushMode[] FlushMode.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Uses of FlushMode in redis.clients.jedis.commands

      Methods in redis.clients.jedis.commands with parameters of type FlushMode 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String ServerCommands.flushAll(FlushMode flushMode)
      Delete all the keys of all the existing databases, not just the currently selected one.
      String DatabaseCommands.flushDB(FlushMode flushMode)
      Delete all the keys of the currently selected DB.
      Response<String> FunctionPipelineBinaryCommands.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      String FunctionCommands.functionFlush(FlushMode mode)
      Deletes all the libraries, unless called with the optional mode argument, the 'lazyfree-lazy-user-flush' configuration directive sets the effective behavior.
      String FunctionBinaryCommands.functionFlush(FlushMode mode)
      Deletes all the libraries, unless called with the optional mode argument, the 'lazyfree-lazy-user-flush' configuration directive sets the effective behavior.
      Response<String> FunctionPipelineCommands.functionFlush(FlushMode mode) 
      String SampleBinaryKeyedCommands.scriptFlush(byte[] sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode) 
      Response<String> SampleBinaryKeyedPipelineCommands.scriptFlush(byte[] sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode) 
      String ScriptingControlCommands.scriptFlush(FlushMode flushMode) 
      String SampleKeyedCommands.scriptFlush(String sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode) 
      Response<String> SampleKeyedPipelineCommands.scriptFlush(String sampleKey, FlushMode flushMode)
